languages.text: {n}Эоганн пораженно замирает, безвольно опустив руки.{/n} "То есть лаборатория на Амсанкте — не единственная? Под эгидой Инквизиции осуществлялось создание некоего проекта, не санкционированного официальным духовенством Адептус Механикус? Теперь я начинаю понимать... теперь я понял".

{n}Astounded, Eogunn turns rigid, letting his hands drop helplessly.{/n} "This means that the laboratory on Amsanct is not the only one? The Inquisition was running a project unsanctioned by the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus? Now the pieces are falling into place... now I see."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн пораженно замирает, безвольно опустив руки.{/n} "То есть лаборатория на Амсанкте — не единственная? Под эгидой Инквизиции осуществлялось создание некоего проекта, не санкционированного официальным духовенством Адептус Механикус? Теперь я начинаю понимать... теперь я понял".

traits.locale_text: {n}Struck with amazement, Eogunn turns rigid, letting his hands drop helplessly.{/n} "This means that the laboratory on Amsanct is not the only one? The Inquisition was running a project unsanctioned by the Adeptus Mechanicus priesthood? Now the pieces are falling into place... now I see."

{n}Struck with amazement, Eogunn turns rigid, letting his hands drop helplessly.{/n} "This means that the laboratory on Amsanct is not the only one? The Inquisition was running a project unsanctioned by the Adeptus Mechanicus priesthood? Now the pieces are falling into place... now I see."

{n}Astounded, Eogunn turns rigid, letting his hands drop helplessly.{/n} "This means that the laboratory on Amsanct is not the only one? The Inquisition was running a project unsanctioned by the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus? Now the pieces are falling into place... now I see."

{n}Astounded, Eogunn turns rigid, letting his hands drop helplessly.{/n} "This means that the laboratory on Amsanct is not the only one? The Inquisition was running a project unsanctioned by the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus? Now the pieces are falling into place... now I see."

languages.text: {n}Asombrado, Eogunn se vuelve rígido y deja caer las manos.{/n} «Entonces, ¿el laboratorio de Amsanct no es el único? ¿La Inquisición estaba dirigiendo un proyecto no autorizado por el sacerdocio del Adeptus Mechanicus? Eso explica muchas cosas... Ya veo».
languages.original_text: {n}Astounded, Eogunn turns rigid, letting his hands drop helplessly.{/n} "This means that the laboratory on Amsanct is not the only one? The Inquisition was running a project unsanctioned by the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus? Now the pieces are falling into place... now I see."

traits.locale_text: {n}Asombrado, Eogunn se vuelve rígido y deja caer las manos.{/n} «Entonces, ¿el laboratorio de Amsanct no es el único? ¿La Inquisición estaba dirigiendo un proyecto no autorizado por el sacerdocio del Adeptus Mechanicus? Eso explica muchas cosas... Ya veo».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡惊愕万分，僵在原地，双手无助地垂落。{/n}“这么说来，阿姆桑克特的实验室并不是孤例？审判庭竟然一直在进行未经机械修会祭司成员批准的项目？现在所有线索都对上了……我终于明白了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Astounded, Eogunn turns rigid, letting his hands drop helplessly.{/n} "This means that the laboratory on Amsanct is not the only one? The Inquisition was running a project unsanctioned by the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus? Now the pieces are falling into place... now I see."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡惊愕万分，僵在原地，双手无助地垂落。{/n}“这么说来，阿姆桑克特的实验室并不是孤例？审判庭竟然一直在进行未经机械修会祭司成员批准的项目？现在所有线索都对上了……我终于明白了。”

languages.text: {n}Der erstaunte Eogunn erstarrt und lässt hilflos die Hände sinken.{/n} "Das heißt, das Labor auf Amsanct ist nicht das einzige? Die Inquisition hat ein von der Priesterschaft des Adeptus Mechanicus nicht sanktioniertes Projekt verfolgt? Langsam fügt sich alles zusammen ... jetzt erkenne ich es."
languages.original_text: {n}Astounded, Eogunn turns rigid, letting his hands drop helplessly.{/n} "This means that the laboratory on Amsanct is not the only one? The Inquisition was running a project unsanctioned by the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus? Now the pieces are falling into place... now I see."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der erstaunte Eogunn erstarrt und lässt hilflos die Hände sinken.{/n} "Das heißt, das Labor auf Amsanct ist nicht das einzige? Die Inquisition hat ein von der Priesterschaft des Adeptus Mechanicus nicht sanktioniertes Projekt verfolgt? Langsam fügt sich alles zusammen ... jetzt erkenne ich es."

languages.text: {n}Stupéfait, Eogunn se raidit et laisse ses mains retomber dans un geste de désespoir.{/n} « Or donc, le laboratoire d'Amsanct ne serait pas le seul ? L'Inquisition développait un projet à l'insu du clergé de l'Adeptus Mechanicus ? Voilà qui explique bien des choses... »
languages.original_text: {n}Astounded, Eogunn turns rigid, letting his hands drop helplessly.{/n} "This means that the laboratory on Amsanct is not the only one? The Inquisition was running a project unsanctioned by the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus? Now the pieces are falling into place... now I see."

traits.locale_text: {n}Stupéfait, Eogunn se raidit et laisse ses mains retomber dans un geste de désespoir.{/n} « Or donc, le laboratoire d'Amsanct ne serait pas le seul ? L'Inquisition développait un projet à l'insu du clergé de l'Adeptus Mechanicus ? Voilà qui explique bien des choses... »

languages.text: {n}Şaşkına dönen Eogunn kaskatı kesiliyor, ellerini çaresizce yanlara bırakıyor.{/n} "Bu, Amsanct'taki laboratuvarın tek olmadığı anlamına mı geliyor? Engizisyon, Adeptus Mechanicus rahipliği tarafından onaylanmayan bir proje mi yürütüyordu? Parçalar yerine oturmaya başladı... Şimdi anlıyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Astounded, Eogunn turns rigid, letting his hands drop helplessly.{/n} "This means that the laboratory on Amsanct is not the only one? The Inquisition was running a project unsanctioned by the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus? Now the pieces are falling into place... now I see."

traits.locale_text: {n}Şaşkına dönen Eogunn kaskatı kesiliyor, ellerini çaresizce yanlara bırakıyor.{/n} "Bu, Amsanct'taki laboratuvarın tek olmadığı anlamına mı geliyor? Engizisyon, Adeptus Mechanicus rahipliği tarafından onaylanmayan bir proje mi yürütüyordu? Parçalar yerine oturmaya başladı... Şimdi anlıyorum."

languages.text:
{n}驚愕したエオグンは硬直し、手を無力に垂れる。{/n}
「つまり、アムサンクトの研究所は唯一のものではないということか。教皇庁の承認を得ずに、インキジシオンが機械神官団のプロジェクトを動かしていたのか。なるほど、これで全てが繋がってくる...」
languages.original_text: {n}Astounded, Eogunn turns rigid, letting his hands drop helplessly.{/n} "This means that the laboratory on Amsanct is not the only one? The Inquisition was running a project unsanctioned by the priesthood of the Adeptus Mechanicus? Now the pieces are falling into place... now I see."

{n}驚愕したエオグンは硬直し、手を無力に垂れる。{/n}
「つまり、アムサンクトの研究所は唯一のものではないということか。教皇庁の承認を得ずに、インキジシオンが機械神官団のプロジェクトを動かしていたのか。なるほど、これで全てが繋がってくる...」
